title: hieracium prostratum subsp. lavernellei
intro: Hieracium prostratum subsp. lavernellei is a subspecies of the Hieracium prostratum plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is commonly found in the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, which may help to treat infections and wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium prostratum subsp. lavernellei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
